title: cynanchum acutum subsp. acutum
intro: Cynanchum acutum subsp. acutum, also known as the 'Huang Jing', is a type of plant in the Asclepiadaceae family, traditionally used in Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including improving kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing cognitive function. In herbal preparations, Cynanchum acutum subsp. acutum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken to promote overall health and well-being.
